keyLocalAmendments: Ord 655 — Class B minimum roof covering citywide (upgrades state Class C floor)
Ord 692 (Aug 2025) — ADU rules: 1,200 sf SFR cap, STR prohibition, JADU owner-occupancy, pre-approval program
Policy P-92-2001 — 15-ft waterfront setback from lagoon bank/bulkhead
Ch. 17.96 (Ord 673/674) — MF objective design standards for R-3/R-4/mixed-use
Ch. 15.45 + SolarAPP+ — automated solar permit program with business license prerequisite

notes.floodZone: FEMA Zone X (levee-protected city). Chapter 15.36 Floodplain Management Regulations applies in any remaining flood-prone areas.
notes.soils: Bay-fill compressible soils — geotechnical reports commonly required for new construction and significant additions.
notes.muniCodeAccess: codepublishing.com WAF-blocked (403 on all chapter-level URLs). Content recovered via search snippets and city ordinance references.
notes.reachCodes: No reach codes confirmed as adopted (May 2026). City developing green building reach code per Climate Action Plan; not yet enacted.
notes.planningPermit: Exterior changes to residential/commercial buildings require concurrent Planning permit with Building permit.
